mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of Floyd H. Thompson
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of Floyd H. Thompson James F. Shelor, Administrator until his death in 09.1904 T. H. Potter, Administrator de bonis non for Floyd H. Thompson Recorded in Settlement Book 1,Page 167, in the Floyd County Circuit Court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
